zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Helyas de Featherstone of Featherstonehalg於大約1168年出生在英國藍卡爾普雷斯頓時，他的父親Sir William de Featherstone of Featherstonehaugh34歲，母親Hadawise de Tynedale24歲。他於大約1200年與Isabel在英國藍卡爾布利亞斯達爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1225年在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德費亞黑斯東享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Helyas de Featherstone of Featherstonehalg于大约1168年出生在英国藍卡爾普雷斯頓时，他的父亲Sir William de Featherstone of Featherstonehaugh34岁，母亲Hadawise de Tynedale24岁。他于大约1200年与Isabel在英国藍卡爾布利亞斯達爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1225年在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德費亞黑斯東享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Featherstone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of the places in Staffordshire, Yorkshire, and Northumberland, which are so called from Old English fetherstān ‘tetralith’, a prehistoric structure consisting of three upright stones capped with a headstone (from Old English fe(o)ther- ‘four’ + stān ‘stone’).

variants.name: Featherson
meanings: English: variant of Featherstone with loss of -t-.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Helyas de Featherstone of Featherstonehalg was born about 1168, in Preston, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir William de Featherstone of Featherstonehaugh, was 34 and his mother, Hadawise de Tynedale, was 24. He married Isabel about 1200, in Bleasdale, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1225, in Featherstone, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Helyas de Featherstone of Featherstonehalg est né environ 1168, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Featherstone of Featherstonehaugh, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Hadawise de Tynedale, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Isabel environ 1200, à Bleasdale, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1225, à Featherstone, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Helyas de Featherstone of Featherstonehalg um 1168 in Preston, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Featherstone of Featherstonehaugh 34 und seine Mutter Hadawise de Tynedale 24. Er hat um 1200 in Bleasdale, Lancashire, England Isabel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1225 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Featherstone, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Helyas de Featherstone of Featherstonehalg è nato il circa 1168 nel Preston, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir William de Featherstone of Featherstonehaugh, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Hadawise de Tynedale, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Isabel circa 1200, nel Bleasdale, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1225, nel Featherstone, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Helyas de Featherstone of Featherstonehalgが約1168年にイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンで生まれた時，父Sir William de Featherstone of Featherstonehaughは34歳，母Hadawise de Tynedaleは24歳であった。約1200年にイギリスランカシュアイアブレアスダルでIsabelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1225年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドフエアスエルストーンで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Helyas de Featherstone of Featherstonehalg(이)가 대략 1168년 영국 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Featherstone of Featherstonehaugh(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Hadawise de Tynedale(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1200년 영국 랭카실르 블리즈데일에서 Isabel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1225년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 피더스톤에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Helyas de Featherstone of Featherstonehalg nasceu aproximadamente 1168, em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Featherstone of Featherstonehaugh, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Hadawise de Tynedale, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel aproximadamente 1200, em Bleasdale, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1225, em Featherstone, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Helyas de Featherstone of Featherstonehalg родился около 1168 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William de Featherstone of Featherstonehaugh было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Hadawise de Tynedale, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel около 1200 г. в местности блисдеил, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1225 г. в местности фитирстоун, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Helyas de Featherstone of Featherstonehalg nació aproximadamente 1168, en Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Featherstone of Featherstonehaugh, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Hadawise de Tynedale, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Isabel aproximadamente 1200, en Bleasdale, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1225, en Featherstone, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años.
